About Ironpath

EVERY BUILD
tells a story

We're not a parts shop. We're builders. Every rig we touch gets treated like it's ours — because we know where it's going. Into the red dirt. Up the rocky climb. Across the flats at 3am with no signal and no excuses.

We spec, source, and fit everything in-house. No shortcuts. No half-measures.

840Builds completed
12Brand partners
4WDOnly. Always.
01
Suspension & Lift

Old Man Emu, Dobinsons, King Springs. Dialled in for your load and terrain.

02
Protection

ARB, TJM, Ironman bull bars, side steps, bash plates and rock sliders.

03
Electrical

Dual battery, solar, DCDC charging, LED lighting and comms.

04
Touring Systems

Drawers, fridges, roof tents, long range fuel and water setups.

YOURS
